title: ShowMyOptifineCape
description: This mod provides the ability to show off your optifine cape without the need to install optifine.
body:
**SHOW MY OPTIFINE CAPE**:    
This mod provides the ability to show off your optifine cape without the need to insteall optifine itself.

**MULITPLAYER**:   
Also works on multiplayer: Allows you to see optifine capes of other players!

**MODPACKS**:   
You can add this mod to ur modpack at any given time.

**ISSUES**:   
Feel free to report any issues and/or open pull requests.

**COMPATABILITY**:   
This mod only works for NEOFORGE.
